title: Drop experimental Python 3.13 free-threaded wheels
author: radarhere
body:
[cibuildwheel 3.4.1](https://github.com/pypa/cibuildwheel/releases/tag/v3.4.1) has just been released. In the release notes, it mentions

> Building for the experimental CPython 3.13 free-threading variant is now deprecated. That functionality will be removed in the next minor release. The [enable](https://cibuildwheel.pypa.io/en/stable/options/#enable) option `cpython-freethreading` is therefore also deprecated. Builds specifying `enable = "all"` no longer select `cpython-freethreading`. CPython 3.14 free-threading support remains available without the `enable` flag. (https://github.com/pypa/cibuildwheel/pull/2787)

We are on cibuildwheel 3.4.0, but Renovate will upgrade us before the next Pillow release, so this PR suggests just dropping `cpython-freethreading` now.

comments.author: hugovk
comments.body: Let's also mention in our release notes that there's no more 3.13t wheels: free-threading was experimental in 3.13, 3.14 and later have official support.
